title: PEAK font
description: Makes the font from the game "PEAK"!
body:
Replaces the font with the one from the game "PEAK"! You are allowed to use this pack in your modpacks BUT YOU CANT TAKE IT CAN CALL IT YOURS >:( I have ran out of things to say. Welp Umm here's a inspirational quote "But you always have to remember, not everything is possible, sure maybe you can build a worden spoon and such, but dont let stuff that dont work stump you down. Never give up if no matter what you do and it wont work just take a breather drink something like water and try again! If that doesn't work maybe there is a reason! Just remember never push yourself
![this is what it looks like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b30024345ab155b4e8ab15dc12821ac9e518867a_0.webp)
